emails.subject: Windfall Profits Tax
emails.body: Windfall Profits Tax Jennifer Can you get a copy of the SBX2 1 and provide short synopsis? Thanks, Jim To: Rick Shapiro; Steffes, James D.; Kaufman, Paul; Jeff Dasovich; Kingerski, Harry; Lawner, Leslie; Susan J Mara; Hedy Govenar; Bev Hansen; Mike Day

emails.subject: RE: Windfall Profits Tax
emails.body: RE: Windfall Profits Tax The most recent bill is at: <URL> An Assembly Ctte. summary can be found at: <URL> Let me know if you would like hard copies, or if you want my own analysis. Jennifer

emails.subject: RE: Windfall Profits Tax
emails.body: A short analysis that indicates who would face the brunt of this bill (Enron?) and the mechanism ($/mwh or of income)? Jim
